name: xtomd-suite
description: Complete integration suite for xtomd.com - convert X/Twitter URLs to Markdown

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd packages/mcp-server && npm install && cd ../cli && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build -w @xtomd/mcp-server && npm run build -w @xtomd/cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @xtomd/mcp-server && npm run test -w @xtomd/cli
scripts.publish:pypi: cd packages/python && python -m build && twine upload dist/*

author: xtomd
